availableSince: Event Service v2 (newer); legacy Alert Manager webhooks are being deprecated.

registration.uiPath: Management Portal > Integrations > Webhooks (newer UI surface).

signing.note: By default, Acronis authenticates the webhook using a bearer token stored in subscription.target.headers (which it sends to your receiver). Optional HMAC signing can be enabled at subscription creation.

transport.retries: Exponential backoff. Failed events are replayable via 'list events' with a time range.

notes: Per-tenant subscription model. MSPs managing many customer tenants either register per-tenant or use 'subscribe_to_descendants: true' on a root subscription.
Acronis uses UUIDs for all resource identifiers.
Two parallel systems exist — Event Service (modern) and Alert Manager (legacy). Prefer Event Service for new integrations.
